_comment: Style + topology track output of the image-extraction VLM pass (workflow-step1.md § 1c-image). One entry per source image. Content-track text (visualGroups[].textContent) is also folded into s01c-content-digest.json as synthetic sections; intent-track fields (intentInference, extractedStyle, designMoves) are merged into s01b-query-intent.json. This file remains the canonical structural reference that Step 5c reads when honoring image-derived layout intent.

overallForm.name: 横向三段式流水线架构图（Ingest → Transform → Serve，等宽三列 + 两段箭头连接）
overallForm.communicates: 数据从摄入到服务的端到端单路径流程，强调中间 Transform 是关键环节

visualGroups.whatItIs: Whole slide. Top band carries title; lower 75% is a horizontal 3-stage architecture diagram with a bottom annotation strip.
Title block, two lines, large display weight. Subtitle sits one baseline below, lighter color.
visualGroups.textContent:
Data Plane Architecture
Ingest, transform, serve — one path

visualGroups.whatItIs: 3 vertical column-stacks of equal width, separated by two large rightward arrows. Each stack contains a header chip and 2–3 stacked rounded boxes. Background is faint grid.
Vertical stack with a teal header chip 'Ingest' and 3 rounded boxes below labelled 'Kafka', 'CDC', 'Webhooks'.
Thick rightward arrow, same teal as Ingest header.
Vertical stack with an amber header chip 'Transform' and 2 rounded boxes 'dbt models', 'Materialized views'. The amber chip is visibly larger than the other two stack headers — the focal column.
Vertical stack with a teal header chip 'Serve' and 3 rounded boxes 'API', 'BI tools', 'Embedded apps'.
visualGroups.textContent: Serve / API / BI tools / Embedded apps

visualGroups.whatItIs: Single-line annotation strip in muted grey, italic. Reads as a tagline below the diagram.

relations.note: Equal column widths emphasize parallel structure
Bookend stages share color; middle stage breaks it

relations.by: amber header larger and warmer than teal bookends
relations.note: Visual focal point is the middle stage
Tagline interprets the diagram as a whole

extractedStyle.fontHint: humanist sans, bold for title and chips, regular for box labels

designMoves.whatDrivesContrast: color-temperature shift (cool teal bookends vs warm amber middle) and chip scale

firstFixation.reason: Largest amber chip in the visual center

designMoves.rhythm: regular 3-column grid with arrow connectors; vertical stacks have consistent box heights
signatureMoves: Bookend cool-color flanks a single warm focal column
Arrows match the upstream stack's color, reinforcing flow direction
Faint background grid grounds the diagram without competing with the boxes

intentInference.rationale: Architecture diagram screenshot, no instruction to reproduce verbatim. Topology should be preserved, surface treatment can be re-authored.

deckInference.notes: Single image. Topology (3-stage L→R pipeline with a focal middle stage) is the load-bearing structure for downstream layoutSpec. inputMode is a Step-5 design-strategy hint — Steps 2 and 3 still run normally and produce s02-communication-brief.json + s03-presentation-blueprint.json.
